title: Darkdrive
excerpt: Fully encrypted private cloud. For personal and work use. Developed and operated in Germany.
content_html:
Darkdrive

Your Private Cloud.
Securely Encrypted.

Store your files with uncompromising security – for personal and work use. Fully encrypted with AES-256-GCM and a client-side split-key architecture. Developed and operated in Germany.

End-to-End Encryption

Secure upload and complete encryption of all files and filenames. Only your key can decrypt your data. Ideal for confidential content.

Organic Structuring

Organize your files with tags instead of rigid folder hierarchies. Combine them flexibly by project, topic, or client and find everything in seconds.

Selected Features

Store all common file formats – from mobile devices or via drag & drop. Search, delete, and export your data at any time. Share selected files securely via a link.

Self-Host Darkdrive

Use Darkdrive independently on your own webspace. Choose the server location and performance yourself. Includes automatic updates and technical support.

Download

Compatible with common web servers from PHP 8.1 and ready in one minute. Licensed under AGPLv3 or a separate commercial license.

Managed Darkdrive

We operate your Darkdrive instance on high-performance shared servers in an ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified data center in Germany. With 100 GB of storage space.

€19 / Month

Price incl. VAT. Your Darkdrive is usually ready in a few hours. Use your-name.darkdrive.de or your own domain. Cancellable monthly.

How Darkdrive Works

Can Darkdrive see my files?

No. Files and filenames are encrypted directly upon upload using AES-256-GCM. Without your password, neither we nor third parties can read the content.

How secure is it really?

Darkdrive uses AES-256-GCM encryption, split-key authentication, CSRF protection, rate-limiting, strict Content Security Policies, and automatic memory-zeroing. Only with complete unauthorized server access could data be intercepted during upload or viewing.

What happens if I lose my password?

Your password is the only key to your data. Since it is not stored anywhere – neither in plaintext nor in a derivable form – your files cannot be recovered without your password. We therefore recommend creating regular backups using the export function.

What file types can I upload?

Darkdrive supports over 80 file types in nine categories: Images (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG, AVIF, HEIC, etc.), Audio (MP3, FLAC, OGG, WAV, etc.), Video (MP4, MKV, MOV, WebM, etc.), Documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, etc.), Archives (ZIP, RAR, 7z, TAR, etc.), Text and Code (TXT, MD, CSV, JSON, PY, JS, etc.), Fonts, Contacts (VCF), and Design Files (PSD, Sketch, Figma, etc.).

What preview features are there?

Images, videos, and audio can be displayed or played directly in the browser. PDFs are opened in the browser, and an encrypted preview of the first page is generated for Office documents. Audio files automatically detect cover images with the same tag and display them as a thumbnail. Automatically generated, encrypted thumbnails appear for all these file types.

How do I use tags?

Tags allow for the thematic organization of files. Multiple tags can be assigned to each file, and the file overview can be filtered by individual tags. Multiple files can be tagged simultaneously using the multi-select feature. A tag is removed by entering it again. All tags are stored encrypted.

Can I share files?

Yes. Individual files can be shared as a decrypted copy via a temporary link. The share can be revoked at any time. The original file remains continuously encrypted – only the shared copy is accessible without a password.

How do I export my files?

Individual files can be downloaded directly from the detail view. For a full export, a ZIP archive can be downloaded decrypted, containing all files or files filtered by tag or type. Specific individual files can also be exported in a bundle using the multi-select feature.

How do I sync my files?

With the separate synchronization tool, files can be automatically synchronized in both directions. New or changed files are downloaded as a decrypted backup, and files are automatically uploaded and encrypted via an upload folder.

Does Darkdrive work on a smartphone?

Yes. The interface is fully responsive and optimized for mobile browsers. Using the "Add to Home Screen" function, Darkdrive can be used like a native app.

Terms of Use

Our software enables the secure storage, management, and access of files via a web interface. Authentication is done using a key known only to you. The range of functions can be expanded through updates; core functions will be retained.

The software is provided "as is" and developed with the highest standards of security, quality, and usability. However, we do not guarantee that it will function without errors. We provide technical support and automatic updates with improvements within the agreed framework.

These terms apply to the use of the Darkdrive software by all customers. Deviating terms are only valid if they have been confirmed in writing.

Self-Host Darkdrive is installed on the customer's own infrastructure. The customer is responsible for data backup, operation, and system security.

Managed Darkdrive is operated on ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified shared servers in Germany. The storage is 100 GB. Security updates are performed. The contract term is monthly and renews automatically. Cancellable monthly.

The software may only be used in accordance with these terms and applicable law. It is forbidden to store or distribute illegal content. It is forbidden to violate the rights of third parties. It is forbidden to distribute malware or circumvent security measures. The user is responsible for their own content.

The provider is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence. In case of slight negligence, the provider is only liable for typical, foreseeable damages. For Self-Host, the customer bears full responsibility for operation and system security. Managed Darkdrive is operated reliably, but interruptions may occur. Regular backups should be performed by the customer using the export function. Liability under the Product Liability Act remains unaffected.

In case of violations of these terms, the provider may remove content, block access, or terminate the contract. The place of jurisdiction is Stuttgart. German law applies.

Imprint

plue GmbH
Dresdener Str. 37
D-73730 Esslingen am Neckar

Contact

service@plue.tech
+49 178 1812864

Managing Director

Benjamin Scherer

Register Entry

Amtsgericht Stuttgart
HRB 784950

VAT ID

DE354618443

Privacy Policy

When visiting the website, technical data is stored. This includes date, time, browser, operating system, anonymized IP address, and pages visited. This data is stored for 30 days and then deleted. No cookies, tracking, or profiling are used. For forms, name, email, and concern are stored only for processing. There is no disclosure to third parties without consent.

Processing is carried out for contract fulfillment, customer communication, fulfillment of legal obligations, and on the basis of consent for voluntary contact. When purchasing via Stripe, this privacy policy is accepted.

The controller is plue GmbH, Dresdener Str. 37, 73730 Esslingen, Germany.
Email: service@plue.tech, Phone: +49 178 1812864

Customers have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction, objection, revocation, data portability, and complaint to the supervisory authority.

Data is not passed on to third parties, except for contract fulfillment. Managed Darkdrive uses servers in the EU/Germany. Self-Host customers decide on data storage themselves. Despite all measures, security vulnerabilities can exist. Log files are stored for 30 days. Customer data is kept as long as the contractual relationship exists and legal obligations require it.

Right of Revocation

Consumers have the right to revoke a purchase contract within 14 days of receiving the goods without giving reasons. Please contact support@darkdrive.de.

Right of Revocation for Digital Products

For digital content, such as this software, which is not sold on a physical data carrier, there is no right of revocation according to § 356 Abs. 5 BGB (German Civil Code), provided you were informed and agreed to this at the time of purchase.

sentences.zh: 因此，我们建议使用导出功能创建定期备份。

blocks.html_en: Our software enables the secure storage, management, and access of files via a web interface. Authentication is done using a key known only to you. The range of functions can be expanded through updates; core functions will be retained.

blocks.html_en: The software is provided "as is" and developed with the highest standards of security, quality, and usability. However, we do not guarantee that it will function without errors. We provide technical support and automatic updates with improvements within the agreed framework.

There is no disclosure to third parties without consent.

content_html_zh:
暗驱

您的私有云。 安全加密。

以毫不妥协的安全性存储您的文件 - 供个人和工作使用。 使用 AES-256-GCM 和客户端分裂密钥架构完全加密。 在德国开发和运营。

端到端加密

所有文件和文件名的安全上传和完全加密。 只有您的密钥才能解密您的数据。 非常适合机密内容。

有机结构

使用标签而不是严格的文件夹层次结构来组织文件。 按项目、主题或客户灵活组合它们，并在几秒钟内找到所有内容。

选定的功能

存储所有常见的文件格式 - 来自移动设备或通过拖放。 随时搜索、删除和导出您的数据。 通过链接安全地共享选定的文件。

自托管 Darkdrive

在您自己的网站空间上独立使用 Darkdrive。 自行选择服务器位置和性能。 包括自动更新和技术支持。

下载

从 PHP 8.1 开始与常见的 Web 服务器兼容，一分钟内即可就绪。 根据 AGPLv3 或单独的商业许可证获得许可。

托管暗盘

我们在德国经过 ISO/IEC 27001:2022 认证的数据中心的高性能共享服务器上运行您的 Darkdrive 实例。 拥有100GB的存储空间。

€19 / Month

价格包括。 增值税。 您的 Darkdrive 通常会在几个小时内准备就绪。 使用 your-name.darkdrive.de 或您自己的域名。 每月可取消。

Darkdrive 的工作原理

Can Darkdrive see my files?

不会。文件和文件名在上传时会使用 AES-256-GCM 直接加密。 没有您的密码，我们或第三方都无法读取内容。

How secure is it really?

Darkdrive 使用 AES-256-GCM 加密、分裂密钥身份验证、CSRF 保护、速率限制、严格的内容安全策略和自动内存清零。 只有完全未经授权的服务器访问，数据才能在上传或查看过程中被拦截。

What happens if I lose my password?

您的密码是您数据的唯一密钥。 由于它不存储在任何地方（既不以纯文本形式也不以可派生形式存储），因此如果没有密码，您的文件将无法恢复。 因此，我们建议使用导出功能创建定期备份。

What file types can I upload?

Darkdrive 支持九个类别的 80 多种文件类型：图像（JPG、PNG、GIF、WebP、SVG、AVIF、HEIC 等）、音频（MP3、FLAC、OGG、WAV 等）、视频（MP4、MKV、MOV、WebM 等）、文档（PDF、DOCX、XLSX、PPTX、ODT 等）、档案（ZIP、RAR、7z、TAR、等）、文本和代码（TXT、MD、CSV、JSON、PY、JS 等）、字体、联系人（VCF）和设计文件（PSD、Sketch、Figma 等）。

What preview features are there?

图片、视频、音频可以直接在浏览器中显示或播放。 PDF 在浏览器中打开，并为 Office 文档生成首页的加密预览。 音频文件自动检测具有相同标签的封面图像并将其显示为缩略图。 所有这些文件类型都会显示自动生成的加密缩略图。

How do I use tags?

标签允许按主题组织文件。 可以为每个文件分配多个标签，并且可以按各个标签过滤文件概述。 使用多选功能可以同时标记多个文件。 再次输入标签即可将其删除。 所有标签均加密存储。

Can I share files?

是的。 单个文件可以通过临时链接作为解密副本进行共享。 该份额可以随时撤销。 原始文件保持持续加密状态 - 只有共享副本无需密码即可访问。

How do I export my files?

可以直接从详细视图下载单个文件。 对于完整导出，可以下载解密的 ZIP 存档，其中包含所有文件或按标签或类型过滤的文件。 还可以使用多选功能将特定的单个文件打包导出。

How do I sync my files?

使用单独的同步工具，可以自动双向同步文件。 新的或更改的文件作为解密备份下载，文件通过上传文件夹自动上传和加密。

Does Darkdrive work on a smartphone?

是的。 该界面完全响应并针对移动浏览器进行了优化。 使用“添加到主屏幕”功能，Darkdrive 可以像本机应用程序一样使用。

使用条款

我们的软件可以通过网络界面安全存储、管理和访问文件。 身份验证是使用只有您知道的密钥来完成的。 可通过更新扩展功能范围；核心职能将被保留。

该软件“按原样”提供，并按照最高的安全性、质量和可用性标准进行开发。 但是，我们不保证其正常运行。 我们提供技术支持和自动更新，并在商定的框架内进行改进。

这些条款适用于所有客户对 Darkdrive 软件的使用。 偏离条款仅在经过书面确认后才有效。

自托管 Darkdrive 安装在客户自己的基础设施上。 客户负责数据备份、操作和系统安全。

Managed Darkdrive 在德国经过 ISO/IEC 27001:2022 认证的共享服务器上运行。 存储空间为 100 GB。 执行安全更新。 合同期限为每月并自动续订。 每月可取消。

该软件只能根据这些条款和适用法律使用。 禁止存储或传播非法内容。 禁止侵犯第三方权利。 禁止传播恶意软件或规避安全措施。 用户对自己的内容负责。

提供商对故意和重大过失承担责任，但不限于此。 如果出现轻微疏忽，提供商仅对典型的、可预见的损害承担责任。 对于自托管，客户对操作和系统安全承担全部责任。 Managed Darkdrive 运行可靠，但可能会发生中断。 客户应使用导出功能执行定期备份。 《产品责任法》规定的责任不受影响。

如果违反这些条款，提供商可以删除内容、阻止访问或终止合同。 管辖地是斯图加特。 适用德国法律。

隐私政策

访问网站时，技术数据会被存储。 这包括日期、时间、浏览器、操作系统、匿名 IP 地址和访问的页面。 该数据将存储 30 天，然后删除。 不使用 cookie、跟踪或分析。 对于表单，姓名、电子邮件和关注事项仅存储用于处理。 未经同意，不得向第三方披露。

处理是为了履行合同、客户沟通、履行法律义务以及在自愿联系的同意的基础上进行的。 通过 Stripe 购买时，即表示接受此隐私政策。

控制器是plue GmbH, Dresdener Str。 37, 73730 埃斯林根, 德国。 电子邮件：service@plue.tech，电话：+49 178 1812864

客户享有知情权、更正权、删除权、限制权、反对权、撤销权、数据可移植权以及向监管机构投诉的权利。

除履行合同外，数据不会传递给第三方。 Managed Darkdrive 使用欧盟/德国的服务器。 自托管客户自行决定数据存储。 尽管采取了所有措施，但仍可能存在安全漏洞。 日志文件保存 30 天。 只要合同关系存在并且法律义务要求，客户数据就会被保留。

撤销权

消费者有权在收到商品后14天内撤销购买合同，且无需说明理由。 请联系support@darkdrive.de。

数字产品的撤销权

对于不在物理数据载体上销售的数字内容（例如本软件），根据 § 356 Abs，没有撤销权。 5 BGB（德国民法典），前提是您在购买时已被告知并同意这一点。
